message:
fix(sling): soften deprecation to tip, support 2-bead auto-resolve

Change explicit-rig batch message from "Deprecation:" warning to
"Tip:" — the auto-resolve feature is brand new, so deprecating the
old form is premature.

Add 2-bead auto-resolve path so `gt sling gt-abc gt-def` enters
batch mode instead of falling through to the single-sling path
with a confusing error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
